root.sql:
SELECT vr_nsk_015_003000.account_year, vr_nsk_015_003000.account_year_tyear, vr_nsk_015_003000.account_month, vr_nsk_015_003000.membership_no, vr_nsk_015_003000.member_group_no, vr_nsk_015_003000.emer_loantype, vr_nsk_015_003000.emer_contract, vr_nsk_015_003000.emer_balance, vr_nsk_015_003000.emer_period, vr_nsk_015_003000.loan_installment_amount, vr_nsk_015_003000.data_monthly, vr_nsk_015_003000.data_balance, vr_nsk_015_003000.period_payment_amount, vr_nsk_015_003000.emer_intarr, vr_nsk_015_003000.report_day , vr_nsk_015_003000.loan_code_desc , vr_nsk_015_003000.balance_date FROM vr_nsk_015_003000 , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and vr_nsk_015_003000.balance_date= '!balance_date_1!' and vr_nsk_015_003000.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
/*WHERE*/
